arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Tottenham Hotspur: Club Friendly, 2025
arts.sum: Mathys Tel grew tired of a lack of minutes in Germany and moved to North London at the start of the year on a loan deal until the end of the 2024/25 campaign. Bayern Munich are gearing up for the start of their season in Germany after a well-earned vacation.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham could now compete with Chelsea for “very complete” title-winner
arts.sum: South Korean defender Kim Min-jae has been linked with a move away from Bayern Munich during the summer transfer window. The 28-year-old central defender has attracted interest from Tottenham Hotspur and Chelsea, as per CFBayernInsider.
